title: Muunilinst

'''Muunilinst''' was a [[planet]]<ref name="BMF45" /> located in the [[Muunilinst system]], in the [[Albarrio sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="SWApp" /> that was the [[homeworld]] of the [[Muun]] [[species]].<ref name="BMF45" /> It was the base of a [[Muunilinst Banking Clan|division]] of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan]],<ref name="Complete Locations" /> and was the site of the [[Battle of Muunilinst]] during the [[Clone Wars]], where the [[Galactic Republic]] took the planet.<ref name="BMF45" />

==Behind the scenes==
Muunilinst was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[Databank (2014-)|Databank]] entry for [[Clu Lesser]] on [[StarWars.com]].<ref name="Clu Lesser">{{Databank|clu-lesser|Clu Lesser}}</ref> [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] first appeared in ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel written by [[Timothy Zahn]] as the first entry in ''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]]''<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref> that was released on [[November 3]], [[1997]].<ref name="Specter of the Past release date">{{RandomHouseOld|url=author/results.pperl?authorid=34041|text=Timothy Zahn}}</ref>

The [[Fantasy Flight Games]] sourcebook ''[[Endless Vigil]]'' incorrectly identifies [[Scipio]] as the Muun homeworld and states that Muunilinst is instead a Muun colony,<ref name="Endless">''[[Endless Vigil]]''</ref> conflicting with [[Star Wars: Build the Millennium Falcon 45|''Star Wars: Build the Millennium Falcon'' 45]]<ref name="BMF45" /> and the planet's original Legends history.<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>
